tasks.title: Deploy loyiha tuzilmasi
tasks.why: Capstone: real deploy loyiha. Avval tartibli tuzilma (Day-1).
steps: Ishchi papkangga o't:  cd ~/devops/days/day-14/work
mkdir -p deploy/app deploy/bin deploy/config

tasks.title: Day-10/11: git'ga ol
tasks.why: Loyihani versiyalash: git init + config + birinchi commit.
steps: cd deploy && git init && git config user.email d@d.uz && git config user.name d
echo '# Deploy' > README.md && git add . && git commit -m 'init'

tasks.title: Day-8: robust deploy skript
tasks.why: set -e + argument: xatoga chidamli deploy skript.
steps: deploy/bin/deploy.sh yoz (#!/bin/bash, set -e): env=${1:-prod}; echo "Deploying to $env"
Sinab ko'r:  bash deploy/bin/deploy.sh prod

tasks.title: Day-13: nginx config
tasks.why: Ilova oldiga reverse proxy nginx config.
steps: deploy/config/site.conf yoz: listen 80 + location / { proxy_pass http://localhost:3000; }

tasks.title: Day-12: erishuvchanlikni tekshir
tasks.why: Deploy oldidan: tarmoq/sayt javob beryaptimi (curl status).
steps: curl -sI https://github.com | grep -i '^HTTP' > deploy/health.txt

tasks.title: Day-9: cron avtomatika
steps: deploy/config/cron.txt ga yoz:  echo '0 4 * * * bash deploy/bin/deploy.sh' > deploy/config/cron.txt

tasks.title: Ilovani commit qil
steps:
echo '

Salom

' > deploy/app/index.html
cd deploy && git add . && git commit -m 'add app'

tasks.title: Versiya fayli
steps: echo '1.0.0' > deploy/VERSION
cd deploy && git add . && git commit -m 'v1.0.0'

tasks.title: Loglarni ignore qil
steps: cd deploy && echo '*.log' > .gitignore && touch deploy.log
Tekshir:  git status (deploy.log ko'rinmasligi kerak)
tasks.check: cd $LAB/deploy && grep -q log .gitignore && ! git status --porcelain | grep -q deploy.log

tasks.title: Health-check skript
tasks.why: Day-12 + Day-13: sayt javob beryaptimi va config to'g'rimi.
steps: deploy/bin/health.sh yoz: site.conf da proxy_pass bo'lsa 'HEALTHY' chiqarsin
grep -q proxy_pass deploy/config/site.conf && echo HEALTHY || echo SICK
Ishlat:  bash deploy/bin/health.sh

tasks.title: Health'ni avtomatlashtir
tasks.why: Day-9: health-check'ni har 5 daqiqada ishlatadigan cron.
steps: deploy/config/cron.txt ga yana bir qator qo'sh:
echo '*/5 * * * * bash deploy/bin/health.sh' >> deploy/config/cron.txt

tasks.title: To'liq deploy ishga tushir
tasks.why: Capstone yakuni: deploy skriptни ishlatib, natijani loglash.
steps: cd deploy && bash bin/deploy.sh prod > deploy.log 2>&1 && echo 'DEPLOY OK' >> deploy.log
Ko'r:  cat deploy.log

tasks.title: 2-hafta xulosasi
steps: 2-haftada o'rgangan eng muhim 3 narsani (bash/cron/git/tarmoq/nginx'dan) ustozга ayt
